column1: # GIGANTIC upload_manifest.tsv — genomesDB STEP_1 ingest_source_data template
# When workflow-COPYME-ingest_source_data is copied to workflow-RUN_N-ingest_source_data,
# this manifest travels with it and describes which terminal files from
# OUTPUT_pipeline/N-output/ get published to the project's data server.
# The surrounding hierarchy (subproject / step / workflow) is INFERRED from
# the manifest's location by the shared helper at
# STEP_1 ingests user-provided genomic resources (proteomes, genomes,
# annotations) per the source_manifest.tsv. Most outputs are operational
# (logs, validation reports) rather than collaborator-facing; defaults
# reflect that. Flip to "yes" anything you want collaborators to browse.

column6: Per-species validation status for the input source_manifest.tsv.
Inventory of proteomes / genomes / annotations ingested in this run.
